description: Presentation-format variants for one comparison page. Each variant states the same underlying facts; only the format (prose vs markdown table) changes. Replace AcmeSearch/CodeHound/FindGrep with your product and competitors, and fill every [FILL] placeholder with facts verified against public documentation.

page_under_test.title: Code Search Tools Compared
page_under_test.content_invariant_note: Prose outside the table sections must be byte-identical across variants. Only the comparison sections differ.

variants.label: Control: prose only
variants.purpose: Baseline. All comparison facts stated in sentences, no tables. Every table variant is measured against this.
variants.content:
## How the tools compare

AcmeSearch supports self-hosted and cloud deployment, with a free cloud tier for up to [FILL: user count] users; paid plans start at [FILL: price] per seat per month. CodeHound is [FILL: deployment model] and starts at [FILL: price] per seat. FindGrep is [FILL: deployment model] with [FILL: pricing summary].

On capabilities, AcmeSearch offers cross-repo regex search and structural (AST-aware) queries. CodeHound offers [FILL: capability summary]. FindGrep offers [FILL: capability summary].

variants.label: Capability matrix table
variants.purpose: Tests whether a yes/no capability matrix raises inclusion and feature recall versus the same facts in prose.
variants.content:
## How the tools compare

| Capability | AcmeSearch | CodeHound | FindGrep |
|---|---|---|---|
| Cross-repo regex search | Yes | [FILL: Yes/No] | [FILL: Yes/No] |
| Structural (AST-aware) search | Yes | [FILL: Yes/No] | [FILL: Yes/No] |
| Self-hosted deployment | Yes | [FILL: Yes/No] | [FILL: Yes/No] |
| Managed cloud offering | Yes | [FILL: Yes/No] | [FILL: Yes/No] |
| API access | Yes | [FILL: Yes/No] | [FILL: Yes/No] |

Each cell reflects public product documentation as of [FILL: snapshot date]. Link every non-obvious claim to its source.

variants.label: Pricing table
variants.purpose: Tests whether numeric pricing cells raise inclusion and get quoted verbatim in buyer-intent answers.
variants.content:
## Pricing

| Plan dimension | AcmeSearch | CodeHound | FindGrep |
|---|---|---|---|
| Free tier | Cloud, up to [FILL] users | [FILL] | [FILL] |
| Entry paid tier (per seat/month) | [FILL: price] | [FILL: price] | [FILL: price] |
| Enterprise | Contact sales | [FILL] | [FILL] |
| Self-hosted license | [FILL] | [FILL] | [FILL] |

Prices from public pricing pages, snapshot [FILL: snapshot date]. Update the snapshot date whenever a vendor changes pricing.
